how_it_works.title: How it works?
how_it_works.subtitle: Simple steps to start your savings journey with Tqdr Plus

steps.title: Pay and Earn
steps.desc: Pay at the shop and get free credit.

steps.title: Save Automatically
steps.desc: Use your credit at the time of purchase and save automatically.

steps.title: Instant Notifications
steps.desc: You will receive an SMS message with discount details and the remaining amount immediately.

customer_features.title: Easier & Smarter Shopping
customer_features.subtitle: Save money and track your balances in your favorite stores via one secure platform.

features.title: Balance Tracking
features.desc: Monitor every penny in your balance at all stores at a glance.

features.title: Instant Confirmations
features.desc: Receive an SMS notification after every transaction with full details.

features.title: Continuous Savings
features.desc: Benefit from exclusive discounts and offers available only to balance holders.

features.title: Financial Security
features.desc: Your rights are protected and secured with the latest digital encryption.

shop_features.title: Pro Tools for Shop Growth
shop_features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage customer relations and loyalty in one platform.

features.title: CRM
features.desc: Full record for each customer, their transactions, and preferences.

features.title: Growth Reports
features.desc: Charts illustrating your business development and monthly performance.

features.title: Liquidity Management
features.desc: Full control over cash flow and deposited balances.

features.title: Loyalty System
features.desc: Advanced tools to ensure customers return for more purchases.

features.title: Gift Cards
features.desc: Ability to send special offers to the most loyal customers.

features.title: Mobile Management
features.desc: Integrated app allowing you to manage your business from anywhere.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Tqdr

questions.a: You can start immediately by registering as a merchant and adding your shop.
Yes, we use the highest security standards to protect all data.

questions.q: Does the customer need an app?
questions.a: No app needed for customers, they just provide their mobile number and get SMS alerts.

questions.q: How does the seller know my balance?
questions.a: Provide your registered number, and after the discount, you get an SMS with details instantly.

questions.q: What if my balance runs out?
questions.a: Simply recharge your balance at any time to continue enjoying exclusive discounts.

footer.description: Tqdr Plus is the ultimate solution for managing customer loyalty and saving money through local stores in an innovative and secure way.
